figures_detected.description: Cylinder block upper face with oil hole to cylinder head covered by shop towel
figures_detected.associated_step: Cylinder Block Distortion and Wear - Step 1

figures_detected.description: Measuring distortion of upper face of cylinder block with a straight edge, showing measurement points numbered 1-6
figures_detected.associated_step: Cylinder Block Distortion and Wear - Step 2

figures_detected.description: Cylinder bore measurement diagram showing out-of-round (X-Y) and taper (A-B) measurement directions, with unit mm (in)
Cylinder block lower surface showing cylinder bore grade numbers and piston grade number locations, with FRONT arrow indicator
Piston with measuring point 'a' (distance from bottom) and diameter 'A' indicated for skirt diameter measurement

steps.text: Clean upper face of cylinder block. Cover the oil hole to cylinder head with a shop towel before removing all traces of cylinder head gasket. This will prevent blockage of the oil hole.
Measure the distortion of the upper face of cylinder block. Limit: 0.10 mm (0.0039 in)
If out of specification, resurface it.

items.label: Cylinder block upper face distortion limit

steps.text: Using a bore gauge, measure cylinder bore for wear, out-of-round and taper. Standard inner diameter: 71.0 - 71.03 mm (2.7953 - 2.7965 in). Wear limit: 0.2 mm (0.008 in). Out-of-round (X-Y) limit: 0.015 mm (0.0006 in). Taper (A-B) limit: 0.010 mm (0.0004 in). If it exceeds the limit, rebore all cylinders. Replace cylinder block if necessary.
Check for scratches and seizure. If seizure is found, hone it.
Measure piston skirt diameter. Piston diameter "A": 70.980 - 71.010 mm (2.7945 - 2.7957 in). Measuring point "a" (Distance from the bottom): 9.5 mm (0.374 in).
Check that piston-to-bore clearance is within specification. Piston-to-bore clearance "B": 0.010 - 0.030 mm (0.0004 - 0.0012 in).

content_blocks.text: If both cylinder block and piston are replaced with new ones, select piston of the same grade number punched on cylinder block lower surface.

items.label: Measuring point a (Distance from the bottom)

tools_referenced.name: Bore gauge
tools_referenced.usage: Measure cylinder bore for wear, out-of-round and taper
